channel.title: Embedded Systems on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Embedded Systems on LiaScript

item.title: AVR8js-mem for LiaScript: Memory Register Visualization for AVR Microcontrollers
item.description: The AVR8js template lets you run Arduino C++ code in the browser with Wokwi components. AVR8js-mem by Fabian Bär extends it with a key teaching feature: real-time memory register visualization. After each simulation cycle, you can display the value of any memory register in binary, hexadecimal, unsigned integer, or custom format — and even plot the values over time as a live diagram.
